title: Kamala Harris Publicly Teases 2028 Presidential Bid
detail: Former Vice President Kamala Harris publicly signaled a potential return to presidential politics on April 10, 2026, teasing a 2028 presidential bid following Donald Trump's electoral victory over her in 2024. The move marks Harris's first clear public hint at re-entering the Democratic primary field and signals she intends to remain a central figure in Democratic Party politics despite her 2024 defeat. The announcement drew immediate attention ahead of the 2028 primary cycle, with Democrats weighing whether a Harris bid would unite or further fracture the party following its 2024 losses.

media.caption: Kamala Harris signals potential 2028 presidential run, re-entering Democratic primary politics
